this->name = name; this->departmentId = getDepartmentId;}void boss::showInfo() { cout << "Work Id: " << this->id << "\tWorker Name: " << this->name << "\tPosition: " << this->getDepartmentName() << " \tJob Responsibilities: Manage anything in the company" << endl;}string boss::getDepartmentName() { return std::string("Boss");} workerManager.h: 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748//// Created by icarus on 22-8-1.//#ifndef WORKMANAGER_WORKERMANAGER_H#define WORKMANAGER_WORKERMANAGER_H#pragma once#include <iostream>#include "worker.h"#include "employee.h"#include "manager.h"#include "boss.h"#include <fstream>#define FILENAME "./employFile.txt"using namespace std;class workerManager { int workerNum; worker **pWorkerArray;public: void addWorker(); workerManager(); static void toContinue(); static void showMenu(); static void exitSystem(); int get_workerNum(); ~workerManager(); void save(); bool fileIsEmpty; void initWorker(); void showInfo(); void deleteWorker(); int isExist(int id); void modifyWorker(); void findWorker(); void sortWorkers(); void clearAllInfo();};#endif //WORKMANAGER_WORKERMANAGER_H workerManager.cpp:  Created by icarus on 22-8-1.//#include "workerManager.h"#include <conio.h>workerManager::workerManager() { this->workerNum = 0; this->pWorkerArray = NULL; ifstream ifs; ifs.open(FILENAME, ios::in); if (!ifs.is_open()) { cout << "File is not found" << endl; this->workerNum = 0; this->fileIsEmpty = true; this->pWorkerArray = NULL; ifs.close(); return; } char ch; ifs >> ch; if (ifs.eof()) { cout << "File is empty" << endl; this->workerNum = 0; this->fileIsEmpty = true; this->pWorkerArray = NULL; ifs.close(); return; } int num = this->get_workerNum(); this->workerNum = num; this->pWorkerArray = new worker *[this->workerNum]; initWorker();}workerManager::~workerManager() {}void workerManager::showMenu() { cout << "Welcome to Worker-Manager" << endl << "1. Add worker information" << endl << "2. Print workers' information" << endl << "3. Delete the resigned work" << endl << "4. Modify the worker's information" << endl << "5. Find a worker's information" << endl << "6. Sort by sequence" << endl << "7. Clear all information" << endl << "0. Exit" << endl;}void workerManager::exitSystem() { cout << "Welcome to use next" << endl; workerManager::toContinue(); exit(0);}void workerManager::toContinue() { cout << "Press any key to continue ..." << endl; getch(); getch();}void workerManager::addWorker() { cout << "Please input the quantity of worker you want to add: " << endl; int addNum = 0; cin >> addNum; if (addNum > 0) { int newSize = this->workerNum + addNum; worker **newSpace = new worker *[newSize]; if (this->pWorkerArray != NULL) { for (int i = 0; i < this->workerNum; ++i) { newSpace[i] = this->pWorkerArray[i]; } } for (int i = 0; i < addNum; ++i) { int id; string name; int departmentNum; cout << "Please input " << i + 1 << "th worker's ID: " << endl; bool isLoop; isLoop = true; while (isLoop) { cin >> id; isLoop = false; for (int j = 0; j < workerNum; ++j) { if (this->pWorkerArray[j]->id == id) { cout << "The ID is already exist, please input again: " << endl; isLoop = true; } } } cout << "Please input " << i + 1 << "th worker's name: " << endl; cin >> name; cout << "Please choose a position for the worker: " << endl << "1. Employee" << endl << "2. Manager" << endl << "3. Boss" << endl; cin >> departmentNum; worker *worker = NULL; switch (departmentNum) { case 1: worker = new employee(id, name, 1); break; case 2: worker = new manager(id, name, 2); break; case 3: worker = new boss(id, name, 3); break; default: break; } newSpace[this->workerNum + i] = worker; } delete[] this->pWorkerArray; this->pWorkerArray = newSpace; this->workerNum = newSize; this->fileIsEmpty = false; this->save(); cout << "Successfully add " << addNum << " workers" << endl; } else { cout << "Input error" << endl; }}void workerManager::save() { ofstream ofs; ofs.open(FILENAME, ios::out); for (int i = 0; i < this->workerNum; ++i) { ofs << this->pWorkerArray[i]->id << " " << this->pWorkerArray[i]->name << " " << this->pWorkerArray[i]->departmentId << endl; } ofs.close();}int workerManager::get_workerNum() { ifstream ifs; ifs.open(FILENAME, ios::in); int id; string name; int departmentId; int num = 0; while (ifs >> id && ifs >> name && ifs >> departmentId) { num++; } ifs.close(); return num;}void workerManager::initWorker() { ifstream ifs; ifs.open(FILENAME, ios::in); int id; string name; int departmentId; int index = 0; while (ifs >> id && ifs >> name && ifs >> departmentId) { worker *worker = NULL; if (departmentId == 1) { worker = new employee(id, name, departmentId); } else if (departmentId == 2) { worker = new manager(id, name, departmentId); } else { worker = new boss(id, name, departmentId); } this->pWorkerArray[index] = worker; index++; }}void workerManager::showInfo() { if (this->fileIsEmpty) { cout << "File is empty" << endl; } else { for (int i = 0; i < workerNum; ++i) { this->pWorkerArray[i]->showInfo(); } }}void workerManager::deleteWorker() { if (this->fileIsEmpty) { cout << "File is empty" << endl; } else { cout << "Please input the ID of the worker you want to delete:" << endl; int id = 0; cin >> id; int index = this->isExist(id); if (index != -1) { for (int i = index; i < this->workerNum - 1; ++i) { this->pWorkerArray[i] = this->pWorkerArray[i + 1]; } this->workerNum--; this->save(); cout << "Delete successfully" << endl; } else { cout << "The id not found" << endl; } }}int workerManager::isExist(int id) { int index = -1; for (int i = 0; i < this->workerNum; ++i) { if (this->pWorkerArray[i]->id == id) { index = i; break; } } return index;}void workerManager::modifyWorker() { if (this->fileIsEmpty) { cout << "File is empty" << endl; } else { int id; cout << "PLease input the ID of the worker you want to modify: " << endl; cin >> id; int ret = this->isExist(id); if (ret != -1) { delete this->pWorkerArray[ret]; int newId; string newName; int newDepartmentId; cout << "The worker whose ID is " << id << "has been found, Please input the new ID: " << endl; cin >> newId; cout << "Please input the new name: " << endl; cin >> newName; cout << "Please input a department for the new worker: " << endl; cout << "1. Employee" << endl << "2. Manager" << endl << "3. Boss" << endl; cin >> newDepartmentId; worker *worker = NULL; switch (newDepartmentId) { case 1: worker = new employee(newId, newName, newDepartmentId); break; case 2: worker = new manager(newId, newName, newDepartmentId); break; case 3: worker = new boss(newId, newName, newDepartmentId); break; default: break; } this->pWorkerArray[ret] = worker; cout << "Modify successfully" << endl; this->save(); } else { cout << "Not found, please try again" << endl; } }}void workerManager::findWorker() { if (this->fileIsEmpty) { cout << "No record" << endl; } else { int way; cout << "Please select a way to find: " << endl << "1. By id" << endl << "2. By name" << endl << "3. By position" << endl; cin >> way; bool isFound; isFound = false; if (way > 0 && way < 4) { switch (way) { case 1: { int id; cout << "Please input the ID of the workers you want to " "find: " << endl; cin >> id; for (int i = 0; i < workerNum; ++i) { if (this->pWorkerArray[i]->id == id) { this->pWorkerArray[i]->showInfo(); isFound = true; } } if (!isFound) cout << "Not found" << endl; break; } case 2: { string name; cout << "Please input the name of the workers you want to " "find: " << endl; cin >> name; isFound = false; for (int i = 0; i < workerNum; ++i) { if (this->pWorkerArray[i]->name == name) { this->pWorkerArray[i]->showInfo(); isFound = true; } } if (!isFound) cout << "Not found" << endl; break; } case 3: { int position; isFound = false; cout << "Please input the position you want to find: " << endl << "1. Employee" << endl << "2. Manager" << endl << "3. Boss" << endl; cin >> position; for (int i = 0; i < workerNum; ++i) { if (this->pWorkerArray[i]->departmentId == position) { this->pWorkerArray[i]->showInfo(); isFound = true; } } if (!isFound) cout << "Not found " << endl; break; } default: break; } } else { cout << "Please try again" << endl; } }}void workerManager::sortWorkers() { if (fileIsEmpty) { cout << "File not found" << endl; } else { int sortWay = 0; cout << "Please select a way to sort: " << endl << "1. Ascending" << endl << "2. Descending" << endl; cin >> sortWay; if (sortWay == 1) { for (int i = 0; i < workerNum - 1; ++i) { for (int j = 0; j < workerNum - i - 1; ++j) { if (this->pWorkerArray[j]->id > this->pWorkerArray[j + 1]->id) { worker *worker = this->pWorkerArray[j]; this->pWorkerArray[j] = this->pWorkerArray[j + 1]; this->pWorkerArray[j + 1] = worker; } } } } else { for (int i = 0; i < workerNum - 1; ++i) { for (int j = 0; j < workerNum - i - 1; ++j) { if (this->pWorkerArray[j]->id < this->pWorkerArray[j + 1]->id) { worker *worker1 = this->pWorkerArray[j]; this->pWorkerArray[j] = this->pWorkerArray[j + 1]; this->pWorkerArray[j + 1] = worker1; } } } } cout << "Sort finished" << endl; this->save(); }}void workerManager::clearAllInfo() { if (fileIsEmpty) { cout << "File is empty" << endl; } else { this->workerNum = 0; fileIsEmpty = true; this->save(); }} CMakeLists.txt: 1234567cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22)project(workermanager)set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 14)add_executable(workermanager main.cpp employee.cpp manager.cpp worker.cpp workerManager.cpp boss.cpp)

posts.text: 本实例是一个使用[[Programming Language]]——[[C++]]实现的基于STL的演讲比赛管理程序 以下为源代码： main.cpp: 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435#include "speechManager.h"using namespace std;int main() { speechManager speechManager; int select; while (true) { system("clear"); speechManager::showMenu(); cout << "Please input a number to continue: " << endl; cin >> select; switch (select) { case 1: speechManager.startContest(); speechManager::toContinue(); break; case 2: speechManager.showRecord(); speechManager::toContinue(); break; case 3: speechManager.clearRecord(); speechManager::toContinue(); break; case 0: speechManager::exitSystem(); speechManager::toContinue(); break; default: break; } }} palyer.h: 1234567891011121314151617181920//// Created by icarus on 22-8-7.//#ifndef SPEECH_PLAYER_H#define SPEECH_PLAYER_H#pragma once#include <iostream>using namespace std;class player {public: string name; double score[2];};#endif //SPEECH_PLAYER_H player.cpp: 12345//// Created by icarus on 22-8-7.//#include "player.h" speechManager.h: 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162//// Created by icarus on 22-8-6.//#ifndef SPEECH_SPEECHMANAGER_H#define SPEECH_SPEECHMANAGER_H#pragma once#include <iostream>#include <vector>#include <map>#include "player.h"#include <algorithm>#include <deque>#include <fstream>using namespace std;class speechManager {public: speechManager(); ~speechManager(); static void toContinue(); static void showMenu(); static void exitSystem(); vector<int> v1; vector<int> v2; vector<int> victory; map<int, player> players; int turns{}; void initContest(); void createPlayer(); void startContest(); void draw(); void speechContest(); void showScore(); void saveRecord(); void loadRecord(); bool fileIsEmpty; map<int, vector<string>> Record; void showRecord(); void clearRecord();};#endif //SPEECH_SPEECHMANAGER_H speechManager.cpp:  Created by icarus on 22-8-6.//#include "speechManager.h"#include <conio.h>#include <numeric>speechManager::speechManager() { this->initContest(); this->createPlayer(); this->loadRecord();}speechManager::~speechManager() {}void speechManager::showMenu() { cout << "Welcome to the speech contest!" << endl << "1. Start a speech contest" << endl << "2. Check past records" << endl << "3. CLear the records" << endl << "0. Exit" << endl;}void speechManager::toContinue() { cout << "Enter any key to continue ..." << endl; getch(); getch();}void speechManager::exitSystem() { cout << "Welcome to use it next time" << endl; toContinue(); exit(0);}void speechManager::initContest() { this->v1.clear(); this->v2.clear(); this->victory.clear(); this->players.clear(); this->turns = 1;}void speechManager::createPlayer() { string nameSeed; nameSeed = "ABCDEFGHIJKL"; for (int i = 0; i < nameSeed.size(); i++) { string name = "Player - "; name += nameSeed[i]; player tempPlayer; tempPlayer.name = name; for (double &j: tempPlayer.score) j = 0; //看上去高级，可读性降低 this->v1.push_back(i + 10001); this->players.insert(make_pair(i + 10001, tempPlayer)); }}void speechManager::startContest() { this->initContest(); this->createPlayer(); this->draw(); this->speechContest(); this->showScore(); this->turns++; this->draw(); this->speechContest(); this->showScore(); this->saveRecord(); cout << "The speech contest has been completed" << endl;}void speechManager::draw() { cout << "The players of " << this->turns << "th round is drawing ..." << endl << "------------------------------------" << endl << "The sequence of players after drawing are: " << endl; if (this->turns == 1) { random_shuffle(v1.begin(), v1.end()); for (auto it = v1.begin(); it != v1.end(); it++) { cout << *it << " "; } cout << endl; } else { random_shuffle(v2.begin(), v2.end()); for (auto it = v2.begin(); it != v2.end(); it++) { cout << *it << " "; } cout << endl; } cout << "------------------------------------" << endl;}void speechManager::speechContest() { cout << "------------------ The " << this->turns << "th round is starting ------------------" << endl; multimap<double, int, greater<>> groupScore; // greater意为由大到小排列 int num = 0; vector<int> currContest; //创建一个正在比赛的容器盛放此轮参赛的选手 if (this->turns == 1) { currContest = v1; } else { currContest = v2; } for (auto it = currContest.begin(); it != currContest.end(); it++) { num++; deque<double> d; //创建一个盛放分数的deque for (int i = 0; i < 10; ++i) { double score = (rand() % 401 + 600) / 10.f; d.push_back(score); } //随机生成分数 sort(d.begin(), d.end(), greater<double>()); //将分数从大到小排序 //去掉最低分和最高分 d.pop_front(); d.pop_back(); double sum = accumulate(d.begin(), d.end(), 0.0f); double average = sum / (double) d.size(); this->players[*it].score[this->turns - 1] = average; groupScore.insert(make_pair(average, *it)); if (num % 6 == 0) { cout << "The place of the " << num / 6 << "th group is" << endl; for (auto &it: groupScore) { cout << "Serial number: " << it.second << " \tName: " << this->players[it.second].name << "\tScore: " << this->players[it.second].score[this->turns - 1] << endl; } int count = 0; for (auto it = groupScore.begin(); it != groupScore.end() && count < 3; ++it, count++) { if (this->turns == 1) { v2.push_back((*it).second); } else { victory.push_back((*it).second); } } groupScore.clear(); cout << endl; } } cout << "------------------ The " << this->turns << "th round is over ------------------" << endl << endl;}void speechManager::showScore() { cout << "------------------ The " << this->turns << "th round progressed as follows ------------------" << endl; vector<int> v; if (this->turns == 1) { v = v2; } else { v = victory; } for (auto it = v.begin(); it != v.end(); ++it) { cout << "Serial number: " << *it << "\tName: " << players[*it].name << "\tScore: " << players[*it].score[this->turns - 1] << endl; }}void speechManager::saveRecord() { ofstream ofs; ofs.open("./speech.csv", ios::out | ios::app); for (auto it = victory.begin(); it != victory.end(); ++it) { ofs << *it << "," << players[*it].score[1] << ","; } ofs << endl; ofs.close(); cout << "Record has been saved" << endl;}void speechManager::loadRecord() { Record.clear(); ifstream ifs("./speech.csv", ios::in); if (!ifs.is_open()) { this->fileIsEmpty = true; cout << "File is not found" << endl; ifs.close(); return; } char ch; ifs >> ch; if (ifs.eof()) { cout << "File is empty" << endl; this->fileIsEmpty = true; ifs.close(); return; } this->fileIsEmpty = false; ifs.putback(ch); string data; int index = 0; while (ifs >> data) { vector<string> v; int pos = -1; int start = 0; while (true) { pos = data.find(",", start); if (pos == -1) { break; } string tmp = data.substr(start, pos - start); v.push_back(tmp); start = pos + 1; } this->Record.insert(make_pair(index, v)); index++; } ifs.close();}void speechManager::showRecord() { loadRecord(); for (int i = 0; i < this->Record.size(); ++i) { cout << "------------------ The " << i + 1 << "th contest ------------------\n" << "FIRST: " << this->Record[i][0] << "\tSCORE: " << this->Record[i][1] << endl << "SECOND: " << this->Record[i][2] << "\tSCORE: " << this->Record[i][3] << endl << "THIRD: " << this->Record[i][4] << "\tSCORE: " << this->Record[i][5] << endl << endl; }}void speechManager::clearRecord() { cout << "Clear all records?" << endl; cout << "1. Yes" << endl; cout << "2. No" << endl; int select = 0; cin >> select; if (select == 1) { ofstream ofs("./speech.csv", ios::trunc); ofs.close(); this->initContest(); this->createPlayer(); cout << "Clear all record successfully" << endl; }}
